message.modSyncGuardLoaded: Sync Guard active. Mass inventory moves are rate-limited to reduce desync risk.
message.modSyncGuardTooManyItems: Sync Guard: move at most {0} items at once to avoid desync.
message.modSyncGuardBatchStarted: Sync Guard: moving {0} items in batches of {1}.
message.modSyncGuardBatchStalled: Sync Guard: batch move stopped — destination full or blocked ({0} items left).
message.modSyncGuardRateLimited: Sync Guard: wait before moving more items.
message.modSyncGuardOrderRateLimited: Sync Guard: wait before sorting containers again.
message.modSyncGuardStats: Sync Guard stats — moves: {0}, bulk: {1}, batched: {2}, throttled: {3}, order: {4}, disconnects: {5}, desync blocked: {6}
message.modSyncGuardAutoRejoin: Sync Guard: reconnecting to the server...
message.modSyncGuardDesyncSuppressed: Sync Guard: desync detected — disconnect blocked. Your world may differ from the server.
message.modSyncGuardHelp: Sync Guard: /syncguard stats | throttle on|off | batch on|off | autorejoin on|off | desynckick on|off | maxitems N | cooldown N | bulkcooldown N | verbose on|off
message.modSyncGuardUnknownOption: Sync Guard: unknown option. Use /syncguard help.
